The ultimate music guessing game for you and your friends!

📱 Step 1: Download TuneTap

Download the TuneTap App for Android

⬇️ Download APK

🔧 Step 2: Install the App

1 Download the APK file from the link above to your Android phone.
2 Open your phone's Settings → Go to Security or Privacy.
3 Enable "Install Unknown Apps" or "Unknown Sources" for your browser or file manager.
(This allows you to install apps outside of the Google Play Store)
4 Tap the downloaded APK file to start installation.
5 Follow the on-screen prompts and tap Install.
6 Open Spotify and make sure a song is playing, then open TuneTap — you're ready to go!
⚠️ Important: This app is safe and created for personal use. Your phone may warn you about installing from unknown sources — this is normal for apps not distributed via the Play Store.

🎮 Step 3: How to Play

1 Open TuneTap — you'll see the main game page with a list of quizzes to choose from: decade-based quizzes (50s, 60s, 70s, 80s, 90s, 2000s, 2010s) plus a General Music Quiz.
2 Tap a quiz to start — TuneTap will immediately begin playing a song from that category!
3 Listen to the song and try to guess the name, artist, and year before tapping the reveal button.
4 Tap the reveal button to uncover the answers one at a time:
🎵 Reveal Song → 🎤 Reveal Artist → 📅 Reveal Year → ✅ Complete
5 Use the in-app controls to manage playback:
⏭️Next — skip to the next song
⏮️Back — return to the previous song
🔀Shuffle — randomise the song order
⏸️Pause/Play — pause or resume the music
💡 Tip: Make sure Spotify is open and playing a song before launching TuneTap for the smoothest experience!

🎯 Game Modes

🎯 Standard Quiz Mode

Perfect for: Testing your music knowledge with friends!

💡 Recommended: Use the General Music Quiz for this mode! The decade-specific quizzes have songs within a narrow 10-year span, making year-guessing very difficult unless you want a real challenge!
  1. Choose a quiz from the TuneTap main page
  2. Listen to the song and take turns guessing:
    • 🎵 Song Name
    • 🎤 Artist / Band
    • 📅 Release Year
  3. Tap the reveal button to check each answer
  4. Award a point for each correct guess
  5. Tap Next to move on — player with the most points wins!

🎲 Hitster-Style Timeline Mode

Perfect for: A fun timeline challenge!

💡 Works great with decade quizzes! The narrower year range makes placing songs in the correct order more of a challenge.

What you need: 10 small pieces of paper per player

  1. Each player writes a random year between 1920–2025 on a piece of paper
  2. If playing a decade quiz, start with the middle year of that decade to give yourself room either side
  3. Place the paper in front of you as your starting timeline card
  4. TuneTap plays a song — guess whether it was released BEFORE or AFTER your written year
  5. If correct: Use the reveal button to find the year, write it on a new card and place it in the correct chronological position in your timeline
  6. If incorrect: No new card — next player's turn
  7. Goal: First player to build a correctly ordered timeline of 10 cards wins!
💡 Strategy Tip: Starting with a year like 1975 gives you plenty of flexibility for both earlier and later songs!

💡 Pro Tips

  • Make sure your phone has a stable internet connection for Spotify streaming
  • Connect your phone to a wireless speaker or adjust volume before starting for the best group experience
  • For Hitster mode, sticky notes are great as they're easy to rearrange
  • Use the Back button if you accidentally skip a song — no need to miss out!

❓ Troubleshooting

App won't install: Make sure "Install Unknown Apps" is enabled in Settings
Song won't play: Make sure Spotify is open and currently playing a song, then relaunch TuneTap.
App crashes: Open Spotify, play any song briefly to activate it, then return to TuneTap and try again.
